name: Ham Dijon W/Pasta
recipeIngredient: 6 cups Hot cooked pasta noodles (ribbons or vermicelli)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, combine the cream and mustard.
2. Bring to a boil over medium heat.
3. Reduce the heat to medium and cook for 8 to 10 minutes, stirring occasionally until slightly thickened.
4. Add the remaining ingredients except pasta, then heat thoroughly.
5. Serve over hot pasta. Serves 4-6.
